payload.answer: The two statements may both be true, but the relationship is ambiguous from the input alone. Please choose a repair action rather than committing any update.
citations: Input: "Concurrent writes: Sam works at Goldman. Sam joined Point72."
repair_options: keep_both — preserve both statements as separate facts because they may refer to different roles or times.
reject_new — keep "Sam works at Goldman" and do not incorporate "Sam joined Point72".
approve_supersession — use only if the Point72 statement is intended to replace the Goldman statement.
edit — revise one or both statements to clarify timing, role, or whether both jobs are current.
